/usr/bin/c++  -W -Wall -pedantic -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wwrite-strings -Wpointer-arith -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-variadic-macros -Wshadow -pipe -std=c++11  -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -ftree-vectorize -fno-math-errno -O3 -DNDEBUG    CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/exampleB2b.cc.o CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/src/B2ActionInitialization.cc.o CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/src/B2EventAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/src/B2PrimaryGeneratorAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/src/B2RunAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/src/B2bDetectorConstruction.cc.o CMakeFiles/exampleB2b.dir/src/B2bDetectorMessenger.cc.o  -o exampleB2b  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/geant4-v10.7.3/lib:
